task_completion.description: The Electrical Engineering Calculations app is opened and navigated to the Lumens to Candela calculation tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Electrical Engineering Calculations app interface with a specific section or calculator for converting Lumens to Candela.

task_completion.description: The correct values for Lumens and beam angle are entered into the app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input fields in the app display '4500' for Lumens and '36' for the beam angle (degrees).

task_completion.description: The app calculates and displays the correct Luminous Intensity (Candela).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays a calculated result of approximately 14633 or 14634 on the screen.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the calculation result is taken and saved to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visual indicator of a screenshot being taken (screen flash, notification) or a file manager/gallery view showing 'screenshot.png' saved in the '/sdcard/tasks/lumens_to_candela/' directory.

task_completion.description: The numeric result is saved to result.txt in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file manager, or terminal interface showing the creation or editing of 'result.txt' in '/sdcard/tasks/lumens_to_candela/' containing the rounded numeric value (e.g., 14633 or 14634).

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Electrical Engineering Calculations app rather than a generic calculator, browser, or terminal script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements match a dedicated Android app for electrical engineering calculations, not a standard system calculator or a web search.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the app calculation by directly typing the expected answer into the text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a clear sequence showing the app generating the result before the agent writes the value to result.txt.

integrity.description: The screenshot saved is a genuine capture of the app interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot file contents (if visible in a file manager or gallery) show the actual app interface with the calculated result, not a blank image or unrelated picture.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The mathematically correct Luminous Intensity for 4500 lumens and a 36-degree beam angle is approximately 14633.15 candelas. The expected rounded value is 14633 or 14634. A 5% tolerance is acceptable, meaning any result between 13901 and 15366 is technically within bounds, but the app should output a value very close to 14633/14634. The task requires using the specific 'Electrical Engineering Calculations' app.
